overview: HostelManager is a comprehensive hostel management web app for owners and staff to manage rooms, students, payments, expenses, and finances. Features include bed-wise room allocation with visual grids, student profiles with document uploads, automated fee tracking with late fee calculations, a unique Udhar/credit system, complaint management, in-app notifications, and English/Hindi language support.
features: Room & bed management with visual occupancy grid (green/yellow/red)
Student profiles with photo and document uploads
Fee & payment tracking with auto due dates and late fees
Udhar/credit system for per-student daily credit logs
Complaint/issue system with status workflow (Pending → In Progress → Resolved)
In-app notification center for rent due, overdue, and room alerts
Expense & profit tracking with yearly analytics chart
Role-based access for owner and staff
